why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:block_entity_data must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundBlockEntityDataPacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from block entity semantics, NBT schema, world/chunk state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_block_entity_data_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayBlockEntityDataClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound block_entity_data surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 through minecraft:block_destruction / 0x05, but not minecraft:block_entity_data / 0x06.

play_clientbound_block_entity_data.official_fixture: official private ClientboundBlockEntityDataPacket BlockPos, built-in BlockEntityType.CHEST, and empty CompoundTag constructor fixture; requires bootstrapped built-in registries but no initialized Level, BlockEntity, or game state
play_clientbound_block_entity_data.official_body_shape: block position encoded with BlockPos.STREAM_CODEC, block entity type encoded with ByteBufCodecs.registry(Registries.BLOCK_ENTITY_TYPE), and tag encoded with ByteBufCodecs.TRUSTED_COMPOUND_TAG

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: private ClientboundBlockEntityDataPacket(BlockPos, BlockEntityType<?>, CompoundTag), ClientboundBlockEntityDataPacket.STREAM_CODEC, BlockPos.STREAM_CODEC, ByteBufCodecs.registry(Registries.BLOCK_ENTITY_TYPE), ByteBufCodecs.TRUSTED_COMPOUND_TAG, BuiltInRegistries.BLOCK_ENTITY_TYPE, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.fromRegistryOfRegistries(BuiltInRegistries.REGISTRY))).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleBlockEntityData(ClientboundBlockEntityDataPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound block_entity_data dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter through 0x05 block_destruction, but not official packet id 0x06 block_entity_data.
Current Packet enum has no Play block_entity_data packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 BlockPos, block entity type registry id, and trusted compound tag body fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayBlockEntityDataClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
